'''Nil Posondum''' was a former head [[Accountant/Legends|accountant]] for [[Trans-Galactic Gaming Enterprises Corporation]] and a [[Thief/Legends|thief]] who found a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of 12,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on his head from the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] after switching allegiances and stealing private data. He escaped [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] and [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], only to be caught and transferred through [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] via [[Kud'ar Mub'at]]. He died on the board of [[Slave I]].
